description:
The file '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth.csv' is already open in JASP. This dataset (Crampton, 1947) examines the effect of Vitamin C dose on tooth growth in guinea pigs, containing 'len' (tooth length), 'supp' (supplement type), and 'dose' (dose in mg/day). Perform a Kruskal-Wallis nonparametric test to compare tooth length across the three dose levels, treating 'dose' as the grouping factor. Include Dunn's post-hoc tests and descriptive statistics in the analysis. Save the JASP analysis file to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth_KruskalWallis.jasp and summarize the results in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/kruskal_wallis_report.txt using these exact labels:

- Kruskal-Wallis H: [value]
- Degrees of Freedom: [value]
- p-value: [value]
- Pairwise Comparison 0.5 vs 1: [significant/not significant]
- Pairwise Comparison 0.5 vs 2: [significant/not significant]
- Pairwise Comparison 1 vs 2: [significant/not significant]
- Conclusion: [one sentence summary]
